claim_boundary: This receipt is a readiness contract for large-model execution evidence. The runner command and resource envelope are implemented, but this does not acquire sources, approve licenses, run mega-tall models, prove crash/OOM-free behavior, create scorecards, satisfy 2/2 large executions, or close Phase 3/Developer Preview RC.
owner_action: Acquire two licensed large OpenSees/reference models, attach checksums and reference outputs, normalize them into the canonical model, run the operator execution receipt command for each model, then attach crash/OOM-free execution receipts and scorecard or approved REVIEW evidence.

required_evidence.required: Verified upstream source URL or DOI for each selected large model.
License review that permits the intended local/workstation execution scope.
SHA256 for each acquired source file or archive.
Reference displacement/reaction/member/modal outputs or approved REVIEW baseline.
Canonical model normalization with units, coordinates, and mapping coverage.
Runtime, peak memory, exit status, crash status, and OOM status per large model.
Large-model scorecard pass or explicit approved REVIEW decision.
Repeatable large-model runner command with selected model inputs and output paths.
required_evidence.runner_command_template: python3 scripts/run_phase3_large_model_execution_receipt.py --model OPERATOR_ATTACHED_MODEL.json --source-id OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SOURCE_ID --case-id OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID --source-sha256 OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SHA256 --scorecard-or-review OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SCORECARD_OR_REVIEW.json --out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.execution_receipt.json --result-out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.result.json --report-out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.validation_report.json --analysis-type model_health --fail-blocked

required_evidence.required: Declared workstation/nightly CPU, memory, timeout, and artifact retention limits.

runner_command_template: python3 scripts/run_phase3_large_model_execution_receipt.py --model OPERATOR_ATTACHED_MODEL.json --source-id OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SOURCE_ID --case-id OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID --source-sha256 OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SHA256 --scorecard-or-review OPERATOR_ATTACHED_SCORECARD_OR_REVIEW.json --out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.execution_receipt.json --result-out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.result.json --report-out implementation/phase1/release_evidence/productization/large_model_execution_receipts/OPERATOR_ATTACHED_CASE_ID.validation_report.json --analysis-type model_health --fail-blocked
summary_line: Phase 3 large-model runner readiness: BLOCKED | executions=0/2 | evidence=2/9
